page.title: Agent
page.description: Configure how your AI receptionist behaves, what it knows, and how it handles calls and messages.

basicSettings.title: Basic Settings
basicSettings.description: Greeting and default language for your receptionist.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Information and guidelines your receptionist uses to answer questions.
knowledge.addKnowledgeDescription: Add opening hours, pricing, FAQs, or any other information your receptionist should know.
knowledge.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload a file so your receptionist can use it.

uploadValidation.unsupportedFile: Supported document types are PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
uploadValidation.maxSize: Documents must be 10 MB or smaller.
uploadValidation.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this document. Please try again.

file.label: File
file.hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
file.dropzonePrefix: Drag and drop a file here, or

title.label: Title
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this piece of knowledge.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: We are open Monday to Friday from 9am to 5pm.
content.hint: The actual information the receptionist should use.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize this knowledge.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Instructions that guide how your receptionist should handle calls and messages.
rules.addKnowledgeDescription: What your receptionist should do, like transfer calls, ask questions and send texts.
rules.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload a file so your receptionist can use it.

uploadValidation.unsupportedFile: Supported document types are PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
uploadValidation.maxSize: Documents must be 10 MB or smaller.
uploadValidation.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload this document. Please try again.

file.label: File
file.hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown.
file.dropzonePrefix: Drag and drop a file here, or

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: Transfer requests to talk to someone to Jannie
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this rule.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: When someone asks to speak to a human, transfer them to 555-123-4567.
content.hint: Describe what the receptionist should do.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize these rules.

greeting.label: Greeting
greeting.hint: The opening line your receptionist uses when answering a call or starting a conversation.

transferNumber.label: Default transfer number
transferNumber.hint: The phone number your receptionist should use when handing a caller off to a human.

empty.description: Create a business first, then return here to configure your AI receptionist.
